result.summary: Found 2 public integration surfaces for agenta.ai: a region-scoped REST API authenticated by Agenta project API keys, and a public unauthenticated MCP documentation server.

agenta_api_key.label: Agenta project API key
agenta_api_key.setup: In the Agenta app, create an API key for your project using the API key management flow documented in [Keys](https://agenta.ai/docs/reference/api/keys) and [Create Api Key](https://agenta.ai/docs/reference/api/create-api-key). Agenta documents that API keys are scoped to a single project and are sent as `Authorization: ApiKey YOUR_API_KEY`. For cloud usage, call the REST API on `https://us.cloud.agenta.ai/api` or `https://eu.cloud.agenta.ai/api` depending on region.

variables.name: region
variables.resolveFrom: Choose the cloud region documented by Agenta: US (`https://us.cloud.agenta.ai/api`) or EU (`https://eu.cloud.agenta.ai/api`). Self-hosted deployments use `$AGENTA_HOST/api`.
variables.description: Cloud region or self-host host name determines the API base URL.
